examples: It looks like some random project they had there unbuilt and they placed it there.
Many other existing DAMS need urgent repairs; many new ones are planned but unbuilt.
Managers delay new products, leave factories unbuilt, pull the plug on loss-making divisions, and cut costs and jobs.
But like everything else in Afghanistan, the unbuilt pipeline is already scorched by history.
Unplanned towns tend to eat into parks, but 40% of Irvine's space will remain unbuilt-on forever.
